title: Result of the 7-day Variable Rate Reverse Repo (VRRR) auction held on April 17, 2026
description: Tenor 7-day Notified Amount (in ₹ crore) 2,00,000 Total amount of offers received (in ₹ crore) 2,28,098 Amount accepted (in ₹ crore) 2,00,031 Cut off Rate (%) 5.24 Weighted Average Rate (%) 5.23 Partial Acceptance Percentage of offers received at cut off rate 78.43 Ajit Prasad           Deputy General Manager (Communications)     Press Release: 2026-2027/96
